decisions.title: Checkpoint M3-bootstrap opened
decisions.description: Workflow existente reutilizado (`build-accel-w0-c6-c8`) e checkpoint documental criado em `.context/workflow/docs/changelog-m3-bootstrap.md` para snapshot pós-M2 e decisões taxonomia/BC.

decisions.title: D1 Subject roots
decisions.description: `aggregation.*` permanece liberado no runtime allowed roots. Evidência: `internal/adapters/jetstream/subject_validation.go` inclui raiz `aggregation` e `docs/contracts/event-bus.md` define exemplos `aggregation.snapshot.*`; manter evita drift com feature-pack orderbook e rota WS de snapshot.
alternatives: Mover `aggregation.*` para `insights.*` e remover root aggregation (rejeitado por quebrar semântica de ownership do BC aggregation).

decisions.title: D2 Owner vs Producer schema authority
decisions.description: Regra final confirmada: quando `producer_bc != owner_bc`, `schema_authority_bc` é obrigatório e deve ser `owner_bc` ou `producer_bc`. Enforcement já implementado em `scripts/check-registry.sh` (validação forte) e em runtime de delivery para contratos ativos (`internal/core/delivery/domain/envelope_policy.go`).
alternatives: Permitir schema_authority livre fora de owner/producer (rejeitado por enfraquecer governança BC).

decisions.title: D3 Instrument vs Symbol normalization authority
decisions.description: Contrato final: normalização canônica para bus/interno é `BTCUSDT` (alnum uppercase), aceitando entrada WS/exchange como `BTC-USDT` e canonicalizando para `BTCUSDT`. Autoridade documental: `docs/contracts/event-bus.md` e `docs/contracts/delivery-ws.md`; autoridade de código: `internal/shared/naming/naming.go`, `internal/shared/envelope/subject.go`, `internal/core/delivery/domain/subject.go`.
alternatives: Manter `BTC-USDT` como canônico interno (rejeitado por conflitar com subject taxonomy e sequencer key).

decisions.title: STOP condition check
decisions.description: Sem STOP neste ciclo: `docs/contracts/event-bus.md`, `internal/adapters/jetstream/subject_validation.go` e `scripts/check-registry.sh` estão consistentes entre roots permitidas (`aggregation|insights|marketdata|quarantine`), formato canônico e governança de schema authority.

decisions.title: Authority links locked for M3 bootstrap
Checkpoint artifact correction
decisions.description: Checkpoint `M3-bootstrap` materializado em `.context/workflow/plan-tracking/m3-bootstrap.json` (decisions ledger do ciclo). O path sugerido `/.context/workflow/docs/changelog-m3-bootstrap.md` não existe no workflow atual.

decisions.title: M3 Commit Chains planned (commit-driven, no feature implementation)
decisions.description: CC1 `chore(governance): lock post-M2 snapshot and authority map` files: `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/docs/rfcs/EXECUTION-SEQUENCE.md`, `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/docs/architecture/TRUTH-MAP.md`; gate: `make docs-check-full`; risco: drift entre snapshots; rollback: revert commit. CC2 `chore(taxonomy): freeze subject roots/runtime-registry parity` files: `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/docs/contracts/event-bus.md`, `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/docs/contracts/subject-registry.yaml`, `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/internal/adapters/jetstream/subject_validation.go`; gate: `make docs-check-full && make invariants-check`; risco: quebra de compatibilidade de subject; rollback: revert + restaurar roots anteriores. CC3 `chore(governance): harden owner/producer/schema-authority checks` files: `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/scripts/check-registry.sh`, `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/docs/contracts/subject-registry.yaml`; gate: `make docs-check-full && make invariants-check`; risco: falsos positivos em CI local; rollback: revert script/check refinements. CC4 `chore(delivery-contract): lock instrument↔symbol normalization authority` files: `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/docs/contracts/delivery-ws.md`, `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/internal/core/delivery/domain/subject.go`, `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/internal/core/delivery/domain/subject_test.go`; gate: `make test-unit && make test-workspace`; risco: regressão de parsing WS; rollback: revert commit e revalidar subject parser. CC5 `chore(validation): codify M3 gate matrix and trigger policy` files: `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/Makefile`, `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/docs/rfcs/RFC-0011-product-parity-marketmonkey.md`; gate: `make docs-check-full && make invariants-check && make test-workspace`; risco: pipeline local mais lenta; rollback: revert matrix policy commit.

decisions.title: M3 mandatory validation gates
decisions.description: Always: `make docs-check-full`, `make invariants-check`, `make commit-msg-check`, `make test-unit`, `make test-workspace`. Conditional: tocar replay/envelope/subjects/storage => `make test-replay-golden`; tocar WS => `make test-workspace-race`.

decisions.title: M3 ordered checklist
decisions.description: 1) Snapshot delta pós-M2 fechado (git log + gates + authorities). 2) D1/D2/D3 decididos e registrados. 3) STOP condition verificada em event-bus vs subject_validation vs registry-check. 4) Commit Chains M3 definidos com files/gates/rollback. 5) Gate matrix M3 fixada (always + conditional).

decisions.title: Checkpoint file materialized
decisions.description: Arquivo de checkpoint criado em `/Volumes/OWC Express 1M2/Develop/market-raccoon/.context/workflow/docs/changelog-m3-bootstrap.md` com snapshot delta, D1/D2/D3, STOP check e authority links.
